title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How do you balance your work or study with your personal life?
Do you think people work too hard in today's society?
What do you do to ensure you switch off from work or studies?
Is there something you wish you had more time for? What is it?
What's more important to you – having a high salary or having free time?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think the rise of remote working has been mostly positive or negative?
Is it important to physically meet colleagues, or can teams work just as well remotely?
How do you think the office environment will change in the next ten years?
